title: Support - Device - No Devices Connected screen
scenario: Support > Device screen shows incorrect message or layout when no devices are connected
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure no Poly Bluetooth audio devices are connected or paired to the mobile device.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger menu) in the top-left or top-right corner.
Observe the displayed screen and message.
expected: The "No Devices Connected" screen displays the message: "No previously connected devices were found. Please connect devices using the mobile device's Bluetooth Settings prior to requesting device support." The screen layout matches the Figma design.
